title: Gītā 1 — Arjunaviṣāda (Bhagavadgītā, adhyāya 1)
source: Word-by-word gold analysis: SanskritGrammar/Concordance/Gita.xlsm (hand-curated lemma·root·morphology·English gloss).

tokens.gloss: by whom the kingdom is held, Dhṛtarāṣṭra
in the field of the Kurus
the army of the sons of Pāṇḍu
by the one to be taught, by a disciple
who are equal to Bhīma and Arjuna
pillar, column or a rapid step, Drupada
bull among men, best of men

sentences.text: yudhā-manyuś ca vikrānta uttamaujāś ca vīryavān
asmākaṃ tu viśiṣṭā ye tān nibodha dvijottama
sentences.deva: अस्माकं तु विशिष्टा ये तान्निबोध द्विजोत्तम

tokens.gloss: of the army, of that which is related to army
for the sake of good understanding

sentences.text: bhavān bhīṣmaś ca karṇaś ca kṛpaś ca samitiṃ-jayaḥ

tokens.gloss: having the strenght of a horse, Aśvatthāman
in that manner, so, in like manner

sentences.text: anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā mad-arthe tyakta-jīvitāḥ
sentences.deva: अन्ये च बहवः शूरा मदर्थे त्यक्तजीविताः

tokens.gloss: for my sake, for my purpose
those who have decided to give up their lives
on all sides protected by Bhīṣma
on all sides protected by Bhīma

sentences.text: ayaneṣu ca sarveṣu yathā bhāgam avasthitāḥ
tataḥ śaṅkhāś ca bheryaś ca paṇavānaka-gomukhāḥ

tokens.gloss: then, after that, from that, for that reason
accompanying small drums, large drums, horns
they were struck, they were sounded

sentences.text: tataḥ śvetair hayair yukte mahati syandane sthitau

tokens.gloss: then, after that, from that, for that reason
on a war-chariot, on a swiftly moving chariot
of Pañcajana, obtained form the demon Pañcajana
one who has a belly like a wolf’s
one whose victory is without end

sentences.text: kāśyaś ca parameṣv-āsaḥ śikhaṇḍī ca mahā-rathaḥ

tokens.gloss: one who has the best bow
pillar, column or a sudden step
one whose banner is a monkey
to Hṛṣīkeśa, to one with erect hair
those who are eager to fight
of one with bad intelligence, of avi-minded
in front of Bhīṣma and Droṇa
of those who rule the earth

sentences.text: tatrāpaśyat sthitān pārthaḥ pitṝn atha pitā-mahān

tokens.gloss: in that manner, so, in like manner

sentences.text: śvaśurān suhṛdaś caiva senayor ubhayor api
sīdanti mama gātrāṇi mukhaṃ ca pariśuṣyati
sentences.deva: सीदन्ति मम गात्राणि मुखं च परिशुष्यति

sentences.text: gāṇḍīvaṃ sraṃsate hastāt tvak caiva paridahyate

tokens.gloss: a bow, a bow  of Arjuna
like, in the same manner as, almost, exactly
better, higher, perfect, the auspiciousness, the welfare

sentences.text: na kāṅkṣe vijayaṃ kṛṣṇa na ca rājyaṃ sukhāni ca
sentences.deva: न काङ्क्षे विजयं कृष्ण न च राज्यं सुखानि च

tokens.gloss: Unexpected Python Error: <Error getting traceback - traceback.print_exception() failed>
or, and, on the other side, but even if, however

sentences.text: yeṣām arthe kāṅkṣitaṃ no rājyaṃ bhogāḥ sukhāni ca
sentences.deva: येषामर्थे काङ्क्षितं नो राज्यं भोगाः सुखानि च

sentences.text: ācāryāḥ pitaraḥ putrās tathaiva ca pitāmahāḥ

tokens.gloss: in that manner, so, in like manner
in that manner, so, in like manner

sentences.text: etān na hantum icchāmi ghnato ‘pi madhusūdana

tokens.gloss: of the kingdom of the three worlds
for the cause, for the reason
for the sake of [ruling] the earth

sentences.text: nihatya dhārtarāṣṭrān naḥ kā prītiḥ syāj janārdana
tasmān nārhā vayaṃ hantuṃ dhārtarāṣṭrān sa-bāndhavān

tokens.gloss: those who are with their relatives
we could bebecause, just, indeed, surely

sentences.text: yady apy ete na paśyanti lobhopahata-cetasaḥ

tokens.gloss: whose minds are affected by greed
done by the destruction of family
that which causes to fall: crime, sin

sentences.text: kathaṃ na jñeyam asmābhiḥ pāpād asmān nivartitum

tokens.gloss: to be known, to be learnt
done by the destruction of family
by those who see, who understand
of those who destroy the family
those for whom the religious offering of food and water has stopped
of those who destroy the family
by these being the causes of the confussion of social classes
of those whose family laws are destroyed

sentences.text: aho bata mahat pāpaṃ kartuṃ vyavasitā vayam
sentences.deva: अहो बत महत्पापं कर्तुं व्यवसिता वयम्

tokens.gloss: those who have weapons in hand
rathasyoparīti – on the seat of the chariot
